Title: CRY1–GAIP1 complex mediates blue light to hinder the repression of PIF5 on AGL5 to promote carotenoid biosynthesis in mango fruit

Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: natural pigment; antioxidant; provitamin A precursor in human diet
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Positive participant in carotenoid biosynthesis and yellow coloration
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Upregulated under blue light in mango fruit flesh
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Upregulated under blue light in mango fruit flesh
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Epoxidizes zeaxanthin toward violaxanthin formation in the xanthophyll pathway
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: Directly forms target product / immediate route to major accumulated carotenoid
Pathway_Genes.Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step: Supported as a key enzyme for violaxanthin biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Transient overexpression in mango fruit flesh and tomato fruit; RT-qPCR; carotenoid quantification; LC–MS/MS-based carotenoid profiling context
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Blue light; darkness; transient overexpression under postharvest light treatment
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MiZEP expression was significantly induced by blue light in mango flesh. 2. Transient overexpression of MiZEP in mango and tomato increased total carotenoid content and promoted yellow coloration. 3. MiZEP was transcriptionally activated by MiAGL5 and contributes to accumulation of violaxanthin-rich carotenoids in mango flesh.
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: Carotenoid metabolite profiling by LC–MS/MS; prior transcriptomic analysis mentioned but no accession provided
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful enzyme target for metabolic engineering or gene stacking to enhance carotenoid accumulation and yellow flesh color in mango and other fleshy fruits
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Violaxanthin and derivatives were reported as the most abundant carotenoids in blue light-treated mango flesh.

Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: natural pigment; antioxidant; provitamin A-related carotenoid pathway contribution
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes carotenoid accumulation as a direct MiAGL5 target in the β-branch
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Induced by blue light; upregulated by MiAGL5 and MiGAIP1; downregulated by MiPIF5 or silencing of MiAGL5/MiGAIP1
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Induced by blue light in mango flesh
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Hydroxylates β-carotene toward xanthophyll formation in the carotenoid β-branch
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: Supplies immediate precursors for zeaxanthin/violaxanthin accumulation
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Gene expression analysis; Y1H; dual-luciferase assay; EMSA; transient overexpression/silencing of upstream regulators in mango flesh
Pathway_Genes.Applied_Promoters: 35S constitutive promoter for transient assays of upstream regulators
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MiBCH1 expression was induced by blue light and strongly correlated with carotenoid accumulation. 2. MiAGL5 directly bound the MiBCH1 promoter and activated its transcription. 3. MiBCH1 expression increased in MiAGL5- and MiGAIP1-overexpressing flesh and decreased under MiPIF5 overexpression or MiAGL5/MiGAIP1 silencing, linking it to carotenoid accumulation.
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Candidate pathway gene for boosting β-branch/xanthophyll carotenoids, especially when stacked with MiAGL5 or light-signaling regulators
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: MiBCH1 was treated mainly as a direct downstream metabolic target of the regulatory cascade rather than independently functionally validated by its own overexpression in this paper.

Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: natural pigment; antioxidant; provitamin A precursor source
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes carotenoid accumulation and yellow coloration by activating MiBCH1 and MiZEP
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: MADS-box transcription factor with conserved MADS and K-box domains
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Blue light-induced in mango fruit flesh
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Blue light-induced in mango fruit flesh
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Activates MiZEP and MiBCH1 transcription by direct promoter binding
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: Blue light; repression by MiPIF5; relief of repression by MiGAIP1 via MiPIF5 interaction
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Key blue light-induced activator connecting light signaling to carotenoid structural gene expression
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Dual-luciferase assay; Y1H; EMSA; subcellular localization; transcriptional activation assay; transient overexpression in mango and tomato; VIGS; carotenoid metabolite profiling
Regulation_Genes.Interacting_Proteins: MiPIF5 (functional upstream repressor); MiGAIP1 (indirect via MiPIF5 antagonism)
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MiAGL5 was identified from blue light-responsive candidate TFs and was the only tested TF that activated the MiZEP promoter. 2. MiAGL5 is a nuclear transcriptional activator that directly binds the promoters of MiZEP and MiBCH1. 3. Overexpression of MiAGL5 in mango and tomato increased carotenoid accumulation and yellow coloration, while silencing reduced carotenoids. 4. MiAGL5 acts downstream of MiPIF5 and MiGAIP1 in the blue light regulatory cascade.
Regulation_Genes.Omics_Data: Transcriptomic candidate screening mentioned; no accession provided. LC–MS/MS carotenoid profiling for MiAGL5-overexpressing mango flesh
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Strong candidate regulator for breeding or engineering higher carotenoid/xanthophyll accumulation in mango flesh; could be stacked with MiCRY1/MiGAIP1 or edited to reduce MiPIF5 repression
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: MiAGL5 promoted not only MiZEP and MiBCH1 but also indirectly increased expression of other carotenoid genes including MiPSYa, MiPDS and MiZDS in mango flesh.

Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: natural pigment; antioxidant; provitamin A precursor source
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes carotenoid accumulation by relieving MiPIF5-mediated repression of MiAGL5; integrates blue light and GA antagonism
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: DELLA family protein, homologous to AtRGA1-type repressors
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Transcript decreased under blue light, but protein accumulated under blue light; overexpression increases carotenoid genes
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Protein abundance increased under blue light and PAC; decreased by GA3
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: Protein-protein interaction-mediated derepression; protein stability control hub
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Hinders MiPIF5 repression of MiAGL5, thereby increasing MiAGL5, MiBCH1, MiZEP and other carotenoid genes
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Signal integration for carotenoid biosynthesis via GA-light crosstalk
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Interacts with MiPIF5 and MiCRY1; interacts with MiSLY1 and GA-dependent MiGID1 in GA signaling context
Regulation_Genes.Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation: Acts in antagonistic blue light–GA regulation centered on DELLA protein abundance
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: Blue light; MiCRY1; GA3; PAC; endogenous GA levels
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Central hub mediating antagonistic effects of blue light and GA on carotenoid accumulation through DELLA protein stability
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Y1H; EMSA; dual-luciferase; transient overexpression and VIGS in mango flesh; pull-down; BiFC; Co-IP; split-LUC; protein immunoblotting; cell-free degradation assay
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MiGAIP1 is a DELLA protein that promotes yellow coloration and carotenoid accumulation in mango flesh. 2. Although it binds the MiAGL5 promoter, it does not directly activate promoter activity. 3. MiGAIP1 physically interacts with MiPIF5 and blocks MiPIF5 repression of MiAGL5. 4. Blue light stabilizes MiGAIP1 protein through MiCRY1 interaction and by lowering GA levels, whereas GA3 reduces MiGAIP1 abundance.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Promising regulatory target for postharvest light management or engineering carotenoid enhancement, but deployment should consider DELLA-associated growth effects in whole plants
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: The paper emphasizes protein abundance, rather than transcript abundance, as the functionally decisive layer for MiGAIP1 under blue light.

Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: natural pigment; antioxidant; provitamin A precursor source
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Represses carotenoid biosynthesis and yellow coloration by inhibiting MiAGL5
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Downregulated under blue light in mango fruit flesh
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Directly represses MiAGL5 promoter activity by binding a G-box motif; indirectly downregulates MiBCH1, MiZEP and other carotenoid genes
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Forms functional inhibitory interaction module with MiGAIP1, which antagonizes its repression
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: Blue light reduces MiPIF5 transcript; MiGAIP1 interaction impairs repression output
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Major negative regulator linking light signaling to reduced carotenoid biosynthesis in darkness
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: EMSA; dual-luciferase assay; transient overexpression and VIGS in mango flesh; pull-down; BiFC; Co-IP; split-LUC
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MiPIF5 is a nucleus-localized PIF that is transcriptionally repressed by blue light. 2. MiPIF5 directly binds the G-box in the MiAGL5 promoter and inhibits its activity. 3. Overexpression of MiPIF5 reduced carotenoid content and carotenoid gene expression, whereas silencing increased carotenoids. 4. Interaction with MiGAIP1 weakens MiPIF5 repression of MiAGL5.
Regulation_Genes.Omics_Data: Transcriptome mining mentioned; no accession provided
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Good target for repression relief, e.g. knockdown/editing to elevate carotenoids in mango flesh, potentially in combination with MiAGL5 activation
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: MiPIF1 was tested as a possible partner but did not interact with MiGAIP1 and was not established as a core regulator.

Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: natural pigment; antioxidant; provitamin A precursor source
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes carotenoid biosynthesis under blue light by stabilizing MiGAIP1 protein
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Upregulated under blue light in mango fruit flesh
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Upregulated under blue light in mango fruit flesh
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Indirectly increases MiAGL5, MiBCH1 and MiZEP expression through stabilization of MiGAIP1
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Blue-light signal input into carotenoid biosynthesis via DELLA stabilization
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Primary blue-light receptor identified in this study that transduces light signal to the MiGAIP1–MiPIF5–MiAGL5 module
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Pull-down; BiFC; split-LUC; Co-IP; cell-free degradation assay; co-overexpression and immunoblotting in mango flesh and Nicotiana benthamiana
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MiCRY1 (mango024864) was induced by blue light and specifically interacted with MiGAIP1. 2. MiCRY1 slowed MiGAIP1 degradation in vitro and increased MiGAIP1 abundance in vivo. 3. Through MiGAIP1 stabilization, MiCRY1 acts upstream of the MiPIF5–MiAGL5 module to promote carotenoid biosynthesis under blue light.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Candidate for light-based postharvest regulation and engineering strategies to improve carotenoid accumulation; best considered together with blue-light management and MiGAIP1 status
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: A second MiCRY1 homolog (mango021673) and MiCRY2 homologs were tested but not supported as interacting core components.
